mapper.select: SELECT NVL((SELECT CARBON_ROAD_TCO2 + CARBON_TREE_TCO2 FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)), 0) + NVL((SELECT CARBON_ELE_TOT FROM CARBON_ELE_TBL e WHERE e.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID), 0) + NVL((SELECT CARBON_GAS_TOT FROM CARBON_GAS_TBL g WHERE g.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID), 0) + NVL((SELECT CARBON_HEAT_TOT FROM CARBON_HEAT_TBL h WHERE h.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID), 0) AS total_emission FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', ''))

SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-01' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_JAN, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_JAN, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_JAN, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-02' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_FEB, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_FEB, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_FEB, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-03' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_MAR, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_MAR, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_MAR, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-04' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_APR, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_APR, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_APR, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-05' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_MAY, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_MAY, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_MAY, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-06' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_JUN, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_JUN, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_JUN, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-07' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_JUL, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_JUL, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_JUL, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-08' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_AUG, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_AUG, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_AUG, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-09' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_SEP, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_SEP, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_SEP, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-10' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_OCT, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_OCT, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_OCT, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-11' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_NOV, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_NOV, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_NOV, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_year) || '-12' AS period, NVL(e.CARBON_ELE_DEC, 0) + NVL(g.CARBON_GAS_DEC, 0) + NVL(h.CARBON_HEAT_DEC, 0) + NVL(road_tree, 0) / 12 AS emission FROM ( SELECT r.CTPVSGG_ID, (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID) AS latest_year, (SELECT NVL(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2, 0) + NVL(c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2, 0) FROM CARBON_TBL c WHERE c.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CARBON_YEAR) FROM CARBON_TBL c2 WHERE c2.CTPVSGG_ID = r.CTPVSGG_ID)) AS road_tree FROM CTPVSGG_TBL r WHERE LOWER(REPLACE(r.CTPV_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{ctpv}, ' ', '')) AND LOWER(REPLACE(r.SGG_NM, ' ', '')) = LOWER(REPLACE(#{sgg}, ' ', '')) ) reg LEFT JOIN CARBON_ELE_TBL e ON e.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_GAS_TBL g ON g.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID LEFT JOIN CARBON_HEAT_TBL h ON h.CTPVSGG_ID = reg.CTPVSGG_ID ORDER BY period ASC

SELECT NVL((SELECT SUM(c.CARBON_ROAD_TCO2 + c.CARBON_TREE_TCO2) FROM CARBON_TBL c JOIN ( SELECT CTPVSGG_ID, MAX(CARBON_YEAR) AS latest_year FROM CARBON_TBL GROUP BY CTPVSGG_ID ) latest ON c.CTPVSGG_ID = latest.CTPVSGG_ID AND c.CARBON_YEAR = latest.latest_year), 0) + NVL((SELECT SUM(CARBON_ELE_TOT) FROM CARBON_ELE_TBL), 0) + NVL((SELECT SUM(CARBON_GAS_TOT) FROM CARBON_GAS_TBL), 0) + NVL((SELECT SUM(CARBON_HEAT_TOT) FROM CARBON_HEAT_TBL), 0) AS total_emission FROM DUAL
